message:
test(proptest): add 19 property tests for extension scoring and scheduler modules (bd-3ar8v.4.48)

Extension scoring (10 tests): github_stars bounded [0,10], github_stars
monotonic, npm_downloads bounded [0,8], compatibility bounded [0,20],
risk bounded [0,15], normalized_utility non-negative, handles special
floats, idempotent, popularity/adoption/coverage component bounds,
gates.passes is AND of all flags.

Scheduler (9 tests): Seq::next monotonic, Seq saturation at u64::MAX,
TimerEntry min-heap ordering consistency, stable_hash determinism,
hash_route valid shard, rr_route valid shard, drain_global_order
ascending, mesh total_depth bounded by capacity, timer cancel idempotent.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
